titleStmt.title: SII 6.700: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 700. (A.R. No. 247-A of 1899). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vīraśrī gajapati gauḍeśvara navakoṭi karnāṭa kalavarageśvara śrīsuvarnakesa
ri govindadeu māhārājāṅka vije [.] vije subharāje samasta Āṭha 8 Aṅka śrāhi ka
kaḍā di 12 sūḍi 11 sukaravāre gadādhara māhāpātraṅka bhāī kripṇamāhāpātraṅka go
vare tala jāara kumbhāni joṣīmānaṅkara thilā kere patra[.] Āmbhara
varatanadesa nandacarama grāmar bhūi bhittare gopāla pāṭaṇā Aṅgali gātraṇolāki cārahada bhittare
E hadakū Uttaraṭā bhūi toṭākū dakhiṇa[.] E maddhira bhūi Aṭhāra hyathanale (pañcāsa puṭā) [.] E māne lekhā [.] E vāramāṇara
bhūi svaṇḍe paramesvaraṅka bhogakarivā nimatte E bhūiki (kamada) gheni Ācāndrārkasthāi kari nidhinikṣepa
kūpapāṣāṇasahita kari ghārāpūrvaka kari dela [.] Ethiki jñāti sāmanta dvārā (dhidānakere) virodha thile [.] Ethakū Āna
voli na pāi [.] Ethakū sāthi deula saṅkapāṭhapāsiṅghū pasapāleka Āje Āgrasara thilei [.] narasiṅghapaṇḍite kulasesvara
Anapāi [.]
Digital edition of SII 6.700 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
